Built Tough.
Built to Last.

Ortega & Sons Concrete delivers expert residential and commercial concrete work — from driveways and patios to full commercial slabs. Family-owned, locally trusted.

Get a Free Estimate Our Services
What We Do

Concrete Solutions for Every Need

From small residential pours to large-scale commercial projects, we handle it all with precision and pride.

Commercial Concrete

Parking lots, warehouse floors, loading docks, sidewalks, and large-scale commercial slabs. We work with contractors and business owners to meet project specs and timelines.

Learn More

Residential Concrete

Driveways, garage floors, walkways, and patios that enhance your home's curb appeal and value. We bring the same professionalism to every residential job, big or small.

Learn More

Custom & Specialty Work

Stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, colored finishes, and decorative borders. We help you achieve a look that's as beautiful as it is durable.

Learn More
Our Story

A Family Built on
Hard Work & Concrete

Eleazar Ortega founded this company on a simple belief: if you do the work right the first time, the customers come back — and so do their neighbors. Together with his sons, he's built a reputation across Wichita for showing up on time, communicating clearly, and delivering results that stand the test of time.

We're not a big corporation. We're a family that takes pride in every square foot we pour. That means you get experienced hands and personal attention on every project.

Years Experience

Your Project

Whether you're planning a new driveway, a commercial slab, or a decorative patio — we'll give you an honest estimate and a clear timeline. No runaround.
